name: remote-browser
tagline: Drives a local or cloud headless browser via the browser-use CLI: navigate, click, screenshot, and tunnel dev servers.
verdict: Strong, highly actionable reference with exact commands, sane defaults, an explicit idempotent-tunnel guarantee, and a troubleshooting section for the riskiest steps. Only gaps are missing negative-trigger scope guidance and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog, or dated revisions.
